# @dlbcodes/ui

> An accessible, tokenized Vue 3 component library built on Tailwind CSS v4,
> class-variance-authority, and Headless UI. Components are compound and
> composable (Trigger/Content patterns), themed entirely through semantic
> design tokens. Published on npm as @dlbcodes/ui.

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/guide/getting-started): Install, Tailwind v4 setup, and first usage.
- [Theming](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/guide/theming): Override semantic tokens to retheme the whole system.

## Installation

Install: `npm install @dlbcodes/ui`
Peer deps: `npm install vue vue-router`

Tailwind v4 setup (in your main CSS):
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@dlbcodes/ui/tokens.css";
@source "../node_modules/@dlbcodes/ui/dist";

## Components

### Primitives

- [Button](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/button): Button with variants (primary, secondary, destructive, outline, ghost, link) and sizes (sm, base, lg, xl, icon, icon-sm). Supports loading, disabled, and rendering as a link via `to`/`as`.
- [Badge](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/badge): Status/label badge with variants.
- [Avatar](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/avatar): User avatar with name/src, sizes sm/base/lg.
- [Spinner](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/spinner): Loading spinner.
- [Kbd](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/kbd): Keyboard shortcut display (Kbd, KbdGroup).
- [Label](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/label): Form label.
- [Separator](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/separator): Visual divider.
- [Skeleton](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/skeleton): Loading placeholder.
- [Progress](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/progress): Progress bar.
- [Alert](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/alert): Message/notification callout (Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription).
- [Tabs](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/tabs): Tabbed interface (Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsPanels, TabsContent); Headless UI, position-paired.
- [Disclosure](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/disclosure): Collapsible section (Disclosure, DisclosureTrigger, DisclosureContent).
- [Empty](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/empty): Empty-state placeholder (Empty, EmptyHeader, EmptyMedia, EmptyTitle, EmptyDescription, EmptyContent). EmptyMedia has variant "default" | "icon".
- [Sidebar](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/sidebar): Responsive app navigation (SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarTrigger, SidebarHeader, SidebarContent, SidebarFooter, SidebarGroup, SidebarItem). Inline panel on desktop (collapsible to hidden via SidebarTrigger), overlay drawer on mobile (<768px). SidebarProvider is required; useSidebar() exposes { collapsed, isMobile, open, close, toggle }. SidebarItem is framework-agnostic via an `as` prop ("a", RouterLink, NuxtLink, "button") with consumer-controlled `active`, and supports `disabled`.
- [Panel](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/panel): Surface container for grouping content (cards, sidebars, sections); compound parts PanelHeader, PanelContent, PanelFooter with concentric corner radii.

### Form

- [Field](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/field): Wires label/description/error and ARIA for a control (Field, FieldLabel, FieldContent, FieldDescription, FieldError). Generates a shared id and cascades disabled/required/invalid. Supports orientation="horizontal" for toggle rows.
- [Input](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/input): Text input. Variants primary | contrast.
- [Textarea](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/textarea): Multi-line text input (autosize).
- [Checkbox](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/checkbox): Checkbox input.
- [Switch](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/switch): Toggle switch.
- [Select](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/select): Single-select dropdown (Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectSearch, SelectItem). Item label is slot content; optional `searchable`.
- [MultiSelect](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/multiselect): Multi-select with summary (MultiSelect, MultiSelectTrigger, MultiSelectContent, MultiSelectItem, MultiSelectSearch). Root exposes slot props (label, count, empty, allSelected, toggleAll, clear).
- [Dropdown](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/dropdown): Action menu (Dropdown, DropdownTrigger, DropdownContent, DropdownItem).

### Overlays

- [Modal](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/modal): Dialog with v-model open state (Modal, ModalHeader, ModalTitle, ModalDescription, ModalContent, ModalFooter, ModalClose). Teleports to body.
- [Popover](https://ui.dlbcodes.com/components/popover): Floating panel (Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent). PopoverContent exposes `close` via its default slot.

## Conventions

- Compound components: compose parts (e.g. Field + FieldLabel + Input) rather than one prop-heavy component.
- All styling via semantic CSS-variable tokens (see tokens.css), which reference an internal primitive palette. Override the semantic tokens to retheme; a [data-theme] block of overrides can switch the whole look at runtime.
- Light mode only (no dark mode).
- Built on Headless UI for accessible overlays/menus/tabs/disclosure; Sidebar and Popover positioning use Headless UI Float.

## Notes

- Select and MultiSelect triggers integrate with Field: inside a `<Field>`, the trigger adopts the field's id, aria-describedby, and aria-invalid.
- Panel (Panel, PanelHeader, PanelContent, PanelFooter) is a general content container used throughout the showcase.
